SESSION_NOT_FOUND.message: This run could not be found.
SESSION_NOT_FOUND.fix: Re-upload your dataset to start a fresh run.

UNSUPPORTED_FILE_EXTENSION.message: That file type is not supported.
UNSUPPORTED_FILE_EXTENSION.fix: Upload a .csv, .xls, or .xlsx file (metadata may also be .json).

FILE_TOO_LARGE.message: The file is larger than the allowed limit.
FILE_TOO_LARGE.fix: Reduce the file size or split the dataset, then upload again.

VALIDATION_REQUIRED.message: Validation must run before metadata generation.
VALIDATION_REQUIRED.fix: Click Validate & Review first, then continue.

VALIDATION_FAILED.message: Metadata generation needs validation to pass first.
VALIDATION_FAILED.fix: Resolve the blocking checks above, then re-run validation.

LLM_CONFIGURATION_UNAVAILABLE.fix: Check provider, model, and gateway settings in Run Configuration.

LLM_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED.message: LLM credentials are required for this step.
LLM_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED.fix: Add an API key or gateway URL in Run Configuration and test the connection.

METADATA_GENERATION_FAILED.fix: Verify the LLM connection, then retry. Check the activity log for details.

TRAINING_ARTIFACTS_INVALID.message: Training cannot start because required files are missing.
TRAINING_ARTIFACTS_INVALID.fix: Re-run validation and metadata generation to regenerate the artifacts.

TRAINING_ALREADY_EXISTS.message: A training run is already in progress for this dataset.
TRAINING_ALREADY_EXISTS.fix: Open Live Training to watch it, or cancel it before starting again.

TRAINING_NOT_FOUND.message: No training run was found for this session.
TRAINING_NOT_FOUND.fix: Start training from the New Run screen.

TRAINING_NOT_CANCELLABLE.message: This training run can no longer be cancelled.
TRAINING_NOT_CANCELLABLE.fix: It has already finished or stopped; refresh to see the final status.

ACTIVITY_LOG_NOT_FOUND.message: No activity log exists yet for this run.
ACTIVITY_LOG_NOT_FOUND.fix: Run an action (upload, validate, train) to generate log entries.
